contract_meta.phase_name: UI Baseline Fixes — Accessibility & Pause Hardening
contract_meta.enhancement: Adds CDI-governed wins for home link contrast, pause clarification reliability, multi-cycle pause/resume handling, and refreshed Playwright baselines.
contract_meta.rationale: Recent UI test runs revealed four gating regressions: axe-core reports a 1.88:1 contrast violation for the fixtures link, pause-immediacy fails when clarifications arrive late, multi-cycle pause/resume never clears required clarifications, and visual regression snapshots drifted after orchestration UI changes. This contract formalizes a discovery-first remediation plan so the executor regains accessibility compliance and deterministic pause behavior without deviating from the locked stack.

project.name: UMCA Executor MVP
project.goal: Restore WCAG-compliant link styling, harden pause clarifications across UI tests, and align Playwright baselines so accessibility and pause UX checks pass consistently.
project.scope: Discovery plus four wins: contrast styling update, shared clarification helper + spec integrations, multi-cycle pause clarifications, and refreshed screenshots.
project.work_profile: Frontend HTML/CSS tweaks, Playwright test refactors, contract/evidence updates
out_of_scope: Backend API changes or new endpoints
Expanding pause orchestration beyond UI-driven fixes

execution_model.verification_strategy: Capture discovery artifacts, implement focused wins, rerun axe-core and Playwright UI suits, and document evidence.
execution_model.description: Agent completes discovery (phase16) before touching code, executes isolated wins with shared helpers, and validates via lint/typecheck/tests plus targeted UI runs.

observability.description: Track discovery, implementation gates, and evidence uploads for accessibility and pause clarifications.

tasks.title: Document integration points for contrast, clarifications, and snapshots
tasks.description: Inspect home link markup, styling, Playwright specs, and snapshot directories; capture integration points in phase16 discovery note/json with ±10 line snippets.
actions: Record existing fixtures link markup and container background (#111827) in public/index.html
Capture absence of anchor styling in public/styles.css near file head
Document clarifications handling blocks in pause-immediacy and pause-resume specs
Note helper exports in tests/ui/helpers.ts for future reuse
List outdated snapshot directories for home/execution-flow
Publish .automation/phase16_discovery.json and .automation/phase16_discovery_note.md
success_criteria: All integration points mapped with file + line references

tasks.title: Improve fixtures link contrast for WCAG 2.1 AA
tasks.description: Remove inline link styling, add high-contrast anchor rules in styles.css, and verify axe-core passes on the home page.
actions: Edit public/index.html to drop inline style and apply semantic class/selector if needed
Add .container a, :hover, and :focus-visible rules with ≥4.5:1 contrast colours (e.g. #60a5fa on #111827)
Maintain visible underline plus focus outline for accessibility
Run npm run lint and npm run typecheck to ensure frontend bundle builds
Re-run tests/ui/home.spec.ts accessibility cases via Playwright to confirm zero violations
success_criteria: Axe scan reports no colour-contrast violations
Link styling matches brand palette while remaining accessible
No regressions introduced to surrounding layout

tasks.title: Harden pause-immediacy clarifications handling
tasks.description: Create a shared clarification helper in tests/ui/helpers.ts and update pause-immediacy spec to use it with generous waits and answer/skip logic.
actions: Add async handleClarifications helper exporting from tests/ui/helpers.ts using Playwright Page APIs
Import helper into tests/ui/pause-immediacy.spec.ts and replace ad-hoc 1s wait logic
Ensure helper supports skip fallback while preferring to answer prompts when options exist
Adjust test annotations/logging as needed to reference helper outcomes
Execute targeted Playwright run to confirm pause-immediacy passes across Chromium
success_criteria: Clarification prompts are consistently cleared before Pause expectations
Test no longer times out waiting for Pause button
Helper reusable by other specs without duplication

tasks.title: Teach multi-cycle pause/resume test to satisfy clarifications
tasks.description: Reuse clarification helper in pause-resume E2E scenarios so both single-cycle and multi-cycle flows start execution reliably.
actions: Import clarification helper into tests/ui/pause-resume-e2e.spec.ts
Refactor first scenario to call helper instead of inline form automation
Invoke helper before multi-cycle loop so Pause button becomes available
Balance waits/log output to reflect helper status (answered vs skipped)
Run Playwright tests for pause-resume specs across Chromium (and optionally firefox/webkit when available)
success_criteria: Pause button becomes visible/enabled without timing out
Clarification helper covers radio/text inputs and skip fallback
Console logs reflect clarification resolution steps

tasks.title: Refresh Playwright home + execution-flow baselines
tasks.description: Validate updated orchestration UI visually, regenerate snapshots for home and execution flow specs, and ensure diffs disappear.
actions: Manually review / (home) and execution flow views to confirm intended layout
Run npx playwright test --update-snapshots targeting home.spec.ts and execution-flow.spec.ts
Commit refreshed PNG assets under tests/ui/*-snapshots/
Re-run Playwright tests (chromium) to verify zero diffs
Document snapshot refresh in evidence note
success_criteria: Updated snapshots exist for all configured browsers
Visual regression step reports no >0.01 pixel ratio diff

tasks.title: Collect evidence and run full validation suite
tasks.description: Aggregate discovery + win evidence, run lint/typecheck/tests/contract/sbom, and store results in phase16 evidence artefacts.
actions: Run npm run lint, npm run typecheck, npm test, npm run contract:check, npm run sbom
Capture targeted Playwright outputs confirming fixes
Update .automation/phase16_evidence.json with command statuses and artefact paths
Summarize outcomes in handoff note if required
success_criteria: Evidence JSON references updated snapshots and Playwright runs
No outstanding accessibility or pause-related failures

discovery_first.description: Wins cannot start before phase16 discovery artefacts are published.

win_isolation.reason: Each win depends on updated helper logic and should be validated sequentially.

frontend_only.note: No backend or schema changes permitted under this contract.

fallback_policies.playwright_flake: If a Playwright project flakes after helper refactor, rerun with --retry 1 before escalation.
fallback_policies.snapshot_review: Do not update snapshots without manual visual verification against expected UI.

ai_executor_guidelines.clarification_handling: Always run the shared helper before asserting Pause button visibility; never assume clarifications are absent.
ai_executor_guidelines.snapshot_updates: Review updated UI manually before calling --update-snapshots to avoid encoding regressions.
ai_executor_guidelines.contrast_changes: Use palette values that satisfy WCAG AA against #111827 and preserve focus outlines.

governance_note.for_human: Contract keeps work constrained to frontend/test layers and maintains CDI discovery-first discipline. Review evidence artefacts before approving snapshot refresh.
